## LibraryRuntime.ProducedMoldedBonBon.setSealChocolate() method

Sets the seal chocolate. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setSealChocolate(chocolateId: IngredientId | undefined): Result<void>;
```
